name: Natsume
description: A girl who lost her father and her right arm due to a Gadoll attack when she was a child. She dreams of joining the Kanochikara and fight the Gadoll as a warrior, but reality bites, and ends up working under [Kaburagi](https://anilist.co/character/170192/) as an armor repairer. Cheerful, energetic, and reckless. (Source: Official Site)

name: Shiro
description: Another fox goddess, who appears at Nakano’s house after Senko. Her pure white tail is a proof of her pure blood! She has special abilities like reading people’s hearts and seeing visions.

name: Shishiba
description: __Height:__ 180 cm Shishiba is an assassin and member of The Order, a group of powerful assassins tasked with keeping the order within the Japanese Assassin Association (JAA). His weapon of choice is a claw hammer.

name: Syaoran
description: Syaoran is Sakura's childhood friend. After Sakura's memories were scattered around different worlds and dimensions, Syaoran made a vow to get them back no matter what. ~!Following the events in Tokyo, it's revealed that this Syaoran is actually a clone of "Syaoran" Li, that was created by Fei Wong Reed with the sole purpose of collecting Sakura's feathers.!~

name: Aika
description: The married older sister of the main male protagonist.

name: Yuu Kamishiro
description: Yuu is a very nervous boy, who was bullied severely, eventually cutting school and becoming a hikkimori. Eventually, he tries to grow stronger by practicing boxing from a book, and by repetition develops a powerful one-two. Beginning to get into fights with delinquents, Yuu finds a sense of place and satisfaction on the streets, but must defend himself against stronger opponents to survive.
